purpose: Close-up of male wrist with watch resting on black leather. Masculine premium.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Editorial watch photography of male wrist showing {watch_descriptor} resting on dark luxury leather surface, white cuff edge of dress shirt visible, soft directional warm light from upper right creating crisp highlights on watch face and band, real skin texture, shot on 100mm macro at f/5.6, no text, no watermark, no face {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: launch, grow. Source code in research corpus: T19. Saudi adaptation guidance: Saudi luxury watch market specific. Default cuff white dress shirt for business context. For thobe context replace cuff with thobe sleeve. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per month.
